data_avail: daily 2017-10..2026-07 (full, checkable); 5m native only from 2026-04-27 (AFTER this 2024 frame); no 1h/4h file for SBILIFE despite registry note
box_tol: mark box HI1500/LO1300 vs REAL 2024 H1 base lo 1307.7 (Jun) / hi 1569.3 (Mar): LO within 0.6%, HI within 4.4% -> mark is an accurate value-area box, BUT detector emits no box (it derives window min-low/max-high on 5m, never a macro band)
entry_match: n/a - mark entry=null (context frame); detect() emits NO evidence for ACCUMULATION phase, only for MARKUP/MARKDOWN
numeric_gap: detector window 40x5m ~=3.3h vs a ~6-month macro base; even reconfigured to D1 the in-range gate fails: 40-D1 band 191.1pt = 5.84xATR14(32.7) but in-range needs band<3xATR(=98pt); phase() end-Jun-2024 net +31 < ATR -> UNCLEAR 0.0 (never ACCUMULATION). range_atr=3.0 would need ~=6.0 to admit a macro range
root_cause: scope/timeframe mismatch: wyckoff.py is an intraday 5m spring/upthrust + short-window phase classifier; the mark is a macro HTF (4h) multi-month accumulation frame. Two compounding structural gaps: (1) no HTF/macro box concept, (2) range_atr band gate calibrated for a 3.3h micro-consolidation rejects macro ranges

data_avail: daily full (checkable); 5m native from 2026-04-27 -> the Jan-Feb 2026 top is NOT covered by native 5m (starts 56d after); no 1h/4h
box_tol: mark box HI2080/LO1980 vs REAL Jan-Feb 2026 top hi 2132.0 (Feb-23) / base ~1951-1955: HI within 2.4%, LO within 1.5% -> accurate premium topping box; detector emits no box
birth_match: partial - mark birth=topping range at premium (short). Detector reads the D1 window as NOT-in-range (band 180.5=4.96xATR36.4) -> UNCLEAR 0.0 AT the Feb top; by end-Apr net -218 -> MARKDOWN conf 1.00 (correct SHORT direction, but WRONG phase label and one leg late). The true UTAD candle Feb-23 fails the volume gate
entry_match: n/a - mark entry=null; MARKDOWN branch would emit a continuation Evidence but only off an M5 swing near live price, not a topping-box entry
numeric_gap: D1 40-bar band 180.5pt = 4.96xATR14(36.4); in-range needs <3xATR(=109.2pt). Feb-23 UTAD H2132>prevRhi2110 & close<mid but vol 998,892 < 1.5xSMA20 (1,688,060) -> spring/upthrust event gate FAILS. phase()=UNCLEAR at top, flips to MARKDOWN (not DISTRIBUTION) only after markdown begins. 5m native starts 56d after the top
root_cause: scale mismatch + range_atr gate rejects the macro range + vol>1.5xSMA event gate misses a low-relative-volume macro UTAD; detector best-case labels MARKDOWN, never DISTRIBUTION, and produces no premium box
